objective: Turn the existing VPI high-resolution warp benchmark into a reproducible module-level demo with correctness and crossover evidence.

allowed: VPI CUDA accelerates high-resolution warp-heavy module workload
VPI backend swap is not a full-pipeline acceleration result for the current 640x360 Python EIS pipeline
forbidden: VPI accelerates the full EIS pipeline
VPI is always faster than OpenCV
high-resolution module speedup proves Regular EIS baseline acceleration

correctness_checks: compare OpenCV CPU and VPI CUDA output under the same transform
state interpolation and border mode differences
record mean absolute difference or other simple image difference metric
do not promote speed-only result if output mismatch is unexplained
stop_reasons: existing evidence sufficient for report without rerun
would require full EIS pipeline rewrite
